korean.politics: 북한이 서울 수도권을 타격할 수 있는 장거리 자주포를 올해 배치하고 첫 구축함 '최현함'을 6월 중순 해군에 인도할 것이라고 발표했다. 김정은 위원장은 직접 최현함에 탑승해 기동 훈련을 참관했다.
korean.economy: 코스피가 7,384.56으로 마감하며 사상 처음 7,300선을 돌파했다. 삼성전자는 아시아 기업 중 두 번째로 시가총액 1조 달러를 넘어섰으며, 평택 P5 팹2 착공을 당초 계획보다 6개월 앞당긴 7월로 결정하고 AMD와 2나노 칩 생산 수주 논의도 진전시키고 있다.
korean.international: 미국과 이란이 호르무즈 해협에서 또다시 교전을 벌였다. 미군이 이란 유조선 2척을 공격했으며, 이스라엘도 지난달 휴전 이후 처음으로 베이루트를 공습해 헤즈볼라 라드완 부대 지휘관을 겨냥했다. 미국 국제무역법원은 트럼프 행정부의 포괄적 10% 관세가 무역법 근거 없이 부과됐다며 위법 판결을 내렸다.

english.politics: North Korea announced it will deploy new long-range artillery systems capable of striking the Seoul metropolitan area this year and hand over its first naval destroyer, the Choe Hyon, to the navy in mid-June. Kim Jong Un personally rode the destroyer to review its maneuverability during a naval exercise.
english.economy: South Korea's KOSPI index closed at a record 7,384.56, surpassing the 7,300 mark for the first time in history. Samsung Electronics became only the second Asian company to exceed a $1 trillion market capitalization. Samsung also accelerated construction of its P5 fab-2 plant in Pyeongtaek by six months to July, and advanced talks with AMD over 2-nanometer chip production orders.
english.international: US and Iranian forces exchanged fire again in the Strait of Hormuz, with US forces targeting two Iranian oil tankers. Israel also struck Beirut for the first time since last month's truce, targeting a Hezbollah Radwan force commander. Separately, the US Court of International Trade ruled 2-1 that the Trump administration's blanket 10% tariffs could not be broadly justified under the Trade Act of 1974.

vocabulary.example: South Korea's KOSPI surpassed the 7,300 mark for the first time in history.
Samsung accelerated construction of its P5 plant by six months.
Kim Jong Un rode the destroyer to review its maneuverability during a naval exercise.
The court ruled that blanket 10% tariffs could not be broadly justified under the Trade Act.
North Korea will commission its first naval destroyer in mid-June.
The court issued a 2-1 ruling that the tariffs were unlawful.

sentences.sentence: Samsung Electronics became only the second Asian company to exceed a $1 trillion market capitalization.
sentences.structure: 주어 + 동사(became) + 보어(only the second Asian company) + to부정사(to exceed...)
sentences.point: "only the + 서수 + 명사 + to부정사" 구조는 역사적 기록을 표현할 때 뉴스에서 자주 사용됩니다.
sentences.similar: She became only the third woman to win the Nobel Prize in Physics.

sentences.sentence: The US Court of International Trade ruled 2-1 that the Trump administration's blanket 10% tariffs could not be broadly justified under the Trade Act of 1974.
sentences.point: "ruled + 투표결과 + that절"은 법원 판결을 보도하는 뉴스에서 자주 쓰이는 구조입니다. could not be justified는 수동태 부정형입니다.
sentences.similar: The appeals court ruled 3-0 that the policy violated the constitution.

sentences.sentence: North Korea will deploy new long-range artillery systems capable of striking the Seoul metropolitan area this year and hand over its first naval destroyer to the navy in mid-June.
sentences.structure: 주어 + will + 동사1(deploy) + 목적어 + 형용사구(capable of...) + and + 동사2(hand over)
sentences.point: "capable of + -ing"는 능력이나 가능성을 표현하는 형용사구로, 군사·기술 뉴스에서 자주 등장합니다.
sentences.similar: The new missile system is capable of reaching targets over 3,000 km away.

expressions.expr: for the first time in history
expressions.usage: 전례 없는 기록을 강조할 때 사용
expressions.example: South Korea's KOSPI surpassed the 7,300 mark for the first time in history.

expressions.usage: 무기, 기술, 시스템의 능력 범위를 설명할 때 사용
expressions.example: North Korea deployed artillery systems capable of striking the Seoul metropolitan area.

expressions.usage: 권한·물건·시설 등을 공식적으로 넘겨줄 때 사용
expressions.example: North Korea will hand over its first destroyer to the navy in mid-June.

challenge.korean: 삼성전자는 아시아 기업 중 두 번째로 시가총액 1조 달러를 넘어섰다.
challenge.answer: Samsung Electronics became only the second Asian company to exceed a $1 trillion market capitalization.
challenge.explanation: "only the + 서수 + 명사 + to부정사"는 역사적 기록을 표현하는 뉴스 영어의 핵심 구문입니다. 'market capitalization(시가총액)'은 경제 뉴스에서 자주 쓰이는 용어입니다.
